channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping outside Surrey Docks water sports centre, 30th March
item.description:
Black binliners, used rubbish bins and general waste dumped outside the water sports centre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New graffiti, 30th March
item.description:
Graffiti steps to river Bermondsey wall top of Wilson Grove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 190-204, Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I did not know that this was a public toilet, 30th March
item.description:
There is a camp here which people are using for flight tip in and also for taking a massive sh+t and then wiping their botties with baby wipes and leaving them all over the floor.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside No. 109 Brondesbury Villas by the tree, 30th March
item.description:
Pillows have been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Aerosol canister - flammable - seems empty - abandoned on grass verge next to pavement/sports field., 30th March
item.description:
Not suitable to put in domestic bin. It was leaning against a tree when last seen 30th march. Please collect.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broad Walk, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willesden Lane by Bembridge Close, 30th March
item.description:
The temporary traffic lights have stopped working and are all showing red causing significant issues with traffic and safety.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on the grass verge, 30th March
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped on the grass verge, just behind the pavement line, as you turn left into Watery Lane from Cray Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Watery Lane, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag fly tipping, 30th March
item.description:
More fly tipping in this area. If the council put up a camera, they'd make a fortune.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hill View Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting and it’s full of bits of rubbish, 30th March
item.description:
Grass needs cutting it’s a mess and the rubbish on the grass needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Broomwood Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping trolley on grass verge. Thirntree Rd (in sight of previously reported dumped fridges)., 30th March
item.description:
Probably dumped yesterday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thorntree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover with no tarmac on A406 entrance slip, 30th March
item.description:
Damaged Manhole Cover missing tarmac - potentially highways drainage manhole in lane 1 of A406 entrance slip eastbound, approximately 100m east of junction with Colney Hatch Lane N11. Close to lamppost marked B395
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pinkham Way, Colney Hatch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins not collected, 30th March
item.description:
Bins on Whitmore Estate have not been collected and are overflowing everywhere.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orsman Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Allerton Rd litter, 30th March
item.description:
Our road doesn’t seem to have been swept for a while so the litter is building up on the pavements and on the road. Please can the street be swept? Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allerton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox by roadside, on the left half way down Thorntree Rd from Kinveachy gardens. Pound Park Rd bus stop shown in photo., 30th March
item.description:
Fox appears recently dead. Probably last night.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thorntree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Serious Litter Problem on Elcot Avenue, 30th March
item.description:
The end of Elcot Avenue (the part off of Commercial Way) is constantly covered with litter. I live on this road and it's really disappointing that nothing seems to be being done about it. There should be a sign that says no littering, a litter bin and maybe even a regular litter picker sent over.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorhome has been dumped outside my property whilst I was away on holiday...the bigger one behind has been there month. Road is turning into a caravan park. As a pensioner, it's difficult for me to reverse off my drive as they cause a blind spot, 30th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerden Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junkie pooing diarrhoea everywhere in red path.Hackney Council could you please clean this crackhead crap up., 30th March
item.description:
Cleanliness and hygiene maintenance required.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buxhall Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car for 1 month, 30th March
item.description:
The car had been there for 4 weeks, sometimes it affects the trafiic flow, collecting rubbish underneath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement parking - again, 30th March
item.description:
Illegal pavement parking by a repeat offender. Please send regular parking wardens to REDFERN ROAD SE6. This is happening on a daily basis

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redfern Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes getting bigger and a lot of loose debris from both the potholes being spread around the road., 30th March
item.description:
I reported the potholes earlier in the year but received a reply that nothing was being done. These same potholes are getter bigger and a lot of loose debris is being scattered over the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clay Wood Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
